ddt:Target.Name: BCM : W61
ddt:Target.Description:
BCM : W61 (iDVU)
Soft V05.01 Spec Tender : ST5 W61 ECU DDT base version : v5.0 W61 Diagnostic Requirement Specification : BCM_DIAG_2-8quatro.xls
JCAE contacts: mickael.grandsire@jci.com iDVU contacts: francois.fc.caron@renault.com

Data.Name: Room Lamp.Test
Data.Comment: Room Lamp actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to turn off room lamp progressive extinction
BCM to turn on room lamp progressive lighting
BCM to turn off room lamp 2 (progressive extinction) : OPTION
BCM to turn on room lamp 2 (progressive lighting) : OPTION

Data.Name: PTC Heater.Test
Data.Comment: PTC Heater actuator test for OutPut Control

Item.Text: BCM to turn on PTC Heater relay 1
BCM to turn on PTC Heater relay 2
BCM to turn on PTC Heater relay 3

Data.Name: Lighting correction.Test
Data.Comment: Lighting correction actuator test for Output Control

Data.Name: Doorlock Indicator.Test
Data.Comment: Doorlock Indicator actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to turn on Door Lock indicator

Data.Name: Child Lock Indicator.Test
Data.Comment: Child Lock Indicator actuator test for Output Control

Item.Text: BCM to turn on Child Lock indicator

Data.Name: Hazard Indicator.Test
Data.Comment: Hazard Indicator actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to turn on Hazard Indicator

Data.Name: Air Conditionning Indicator.Test
Data.Comment: Air Conditionning Indicator actuator test for Output Control

Item.Text: BCM to turn on A/C Indicator

Data.Name: BCM can receive messages from USM
Data.Comment: BCM is allowed to receive messages from USM

Data.Name: BCM can receive messages from ECM
Data.Comment: BCM is allowed to receive messages from ECM

Data.Name: BCM can transmit messages on CAN
Data.Comment: BCM is allowed to transmit message on CAN

Data.Name: BCM can receive messages from METER
Data.Comment: BCM can receive messages from METER

Data.Name: BCM can receive messages from SMART
Data.Comment: BCM can receive messages from SMART

Data.Name: BCM can receive messages from ABS
Data.Comment: BCM can receive messages from ABS

Data.Name: BCM can receive messages from AIR COND
Data.Comment: BCM can receive messages from AIR COND

Data.Name: BCM can receive message from AIRBAG
Data.Comment: BCM can receive message from AIRBAG

Data.Name: Day in year
Data.Comment: n° du jour de fabrication du calculateur ( 1 à 365 )

Data.Name: Part unit serial number
Data.Comment: numéro de série de la piece

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: V.I.N. to be written: 17 characters (in ASCII)

Data.Name: Year / Month / Day
Data.Comment: date to be written = Year / Month / Day (to be coded in B.C.D.)

Data.Name: HEADLAMP_WASH_FREQ_TP
Data.Comment: Data * 1 screen washes to trigger headlamp wash.

Data.Name: NB_IGN_RAZCOD_AFS
Data.Comment: Nb ignition before after-sales code erase

Data.Name: IdentifierKey1
Data.Comment: 0 to FF FF FF FF h

Data.Name: IdentifierKey2
Data.Comment: 0 to FF FF FF FF h

Data.Name: IdentifierKey3
Data.Comment: 0 to FF FF FF FF h

Data.Name: IdentifierKey4
Data.Comment: 0 to FF FF FF FF h

Data.Name: NbKeyStd433MhzLearnt
Data.Comment: Number of 433 MHz keys already learnt

Data.Name: IDE
Data.Comment: 0 to FF FF FF FF h

Data.Name: LAST_RESYNC_VALUE (Key 1)
Data.Comment: Last resynchronization value computed by BCM (Key 1)

Data.Name: LAST_RESYNC_VALUE (Key 2)
Data.Comment: Last resynchronization value computed by BCM (Key 2)

Data.Name: LAST_RESYNC_VALUE (Key 3)
Data.Comment: Last resynchronization value computed by BCM (Key 3)

Data.Name: LAST_RESYNC_VALUE (Key 4)
Data.Comment: Last resynchronization value computed by BCM (Key 4)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_READ_BY_BCM (Key 1)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value read by BCM in key (Key 1)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_READ_BY_BCM (Key 2)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value read by BCM in key (Key 2)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_READ_BY_BCM (Key 3)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value read by BCM in key (Key 3)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_READ_BY_BCM (Key 4)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value read by BCM in key (Key 4)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_WRITTEN_BY_BCM (Key 1)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value written by BCM in key (Key 1)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_WRITTEN_BY_BCM (Key 2)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value written by BCM in key (Key 2)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_WRITTEN_BY_BCM (Key 3)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value written by BCM in key (Key 3)

Data.Name: RESYNC_VALUE_WRITTEN_BY_BCM (Key 4)
Data.Comment: Resynchronization value written by BCM in key (Key 4)

Data.Name: ATTEMPTED_AUTHENTICATIONS_COUNTER
Data.Comment: Number of authentications attempted by BCM

Data.Name: resynchronisation_in_progress
Data.Comment: 1 if key is resynchronised with next authentification

Data.Name: Lock_from_the_outside_s
Data.Comment: 1 if the tast action of locking come from RF.

Data.Name: TURN_RH_SW
Data.Comment: Right flash indicator switch input value

Data.Name: TURN_LH_SW
Data.Comment: Left flash indicator switch input value

Data.Name: PASSING_SW
Data.Comment: Passing / Headlight flash switch input value

Data.Name: DOORLOCK_UNLOCK_PAS
Data.Comment: Doorlock BCM output for unlock passenger side

Data.Name: DOOR_SW_RR
Data.Comment: Rear right door contact input value

Data.Name: DOOR_SW_RL
Data.Comment: Rear left door contact input value

Data.Name: RR_FOG_LAMP_SW
Data.Comment: Rear fog lamp switch input value

Data.Name: RR_DEF_SW
Data.Comment: Rear window defogger switch input value

Data.Name: DOORLOCK_TAILGATE
Data.Comment: Doorlock BCM output for locking tailgate

Data.Name: FR_FOG_LAMP_SW
Data.Comment: Front fog lamp switch input value

Data.Name: FR_WIPER_HI_SW
Data.Comment: Front wipper high switch input value

Data.Name: FR_WIPER_LO_SW
Data.Comment: Front wipper low switch input value

Data.Name: INT_VOLUME
Data.Comment: Renault : 1 = off/off/off ; 2 = on/off/off ; 3 = off/on/off 4 = off/off/on ; invalid = all others

Data.Name: RR_AUTO_STOP_SW
Data.Comment: Rear wiper auto stop contact input value

Data.Name: RR_WIPER_INT_SW
Data.Comment: Rear wiper intermittent switch input value

Data.Name: CHILDLOCK_INDICATOR
Data.Comment: Child lock status led output value

Data.Name: CHILD_LOCK_REQUEST_SW
Data.Comment: Child lock request switch input value

Data.Name: CHILDLOCK_STATUS_PLCD
Data.Comment: Childlock status for right side door

Data.Name: CHILDLOCK_STATUS_PLCG
Data.Comment: Childlock status for left side door

Data.Name: I_TUP_ZONE
Data.Comment: Break pad wear indicator input value

Data.Name: O_TUP_CONTROL_ZONE
Data.Comment: Break pad wear indicator output value

Data.Name: WINDOW_CONTROL_UP_SW
Data.Comment: Window up control switch input value

Data.Name: WINDOW_CONTROL_DOWN_SW
Data.Comment: Window down control switch input value

Data.Name: DOORLOCK_UNLOCK_DR
Data.Comment: Doorlock BCM output for unlock driver side

Data.Name: DOORLOCK_UNLOCK_FUEL
Data.Comment: Doorlock BCM output for unlock fuel door

Data.Name: DOORLOCK_UNLOCK_RD_RL
Data.Comment: Doorlock BCM output for unlock rear left and right

Data.Name: Enter Reassignment Mode After Sales__After Sales Code
Exit Reassignment Mode After Sales__Other parameters
Enter Learning ECM After Sales Mode__After Sales Code
Enter Learning ECM After Sales Mode__RoutineEntryStatus
Enter Learning ECM After Sales Mode__RoutineInputStatus
Exit Learning ECM After Sales Mode__RoutineInputStatus

Item.Text: send -39°c on CAN and on O_OAT_OUTPUT (PWM)
send 0°c on CAN and on O_OAT_OUTPUT (PWM)
send 59°c on CAN and on O_OAT_OUTPUT (PWM)

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: List of actuators to be used for Output Permanent Control

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: List of actuators to be used for Output Permanent Control

Item.Text: ($01) BCM to activate ACC room lamp relay for 1 s
($02) BCM to activate ACC room lamp relay for 1 s

Data.Name: NUMBER_DISABLE_TP
Data.Comment: Linked to the DLK motor protection

Data.Name: NUMBER_ENABLE_TP
Data.Comment: Linked to the DLK motor protection

Data.Name: TYPE_CLIM_CF
Data.Comment: 00 = Heating ; 01 = Manual AC ; 10 = Automatic AC ; 11 = Invalid

Data.Name: TYPE_ALT
Data.Comment: 0 = Version with no DF terminal ; 1 = Version with DF terminal

Data.Name: CONFIG_CTP
Data.Comment: 00 = PTC0 config (no PTC) ; 01 = PTC1 config ; 11 = PTC3 config ; 10 = PTC2 config

Data.Name: FR_WIPER_PROLONGATION_WIPES_TP
Data.Comment: Data * 1 wipes after pass through park position

Data.Name: RR_WIPER_PROLONGATION_WIPES_TP
Data.Comment: Data * 1 wipes after pass through park position

Data.Name: FR_WIPER_INT_SW_FILTER_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Data * 20 ms (0 to 300 ms step 20 ms)

Data.Name: DEFROSTER_CF
Data.Comment: 0= without Rear defroster ; 1 = with Rear defroster

Data.Name: Tunnel
Data.Comment: 00 = no tunnel detected ; 01 = tunnel detected ; 10 = reserved ; 11 = invalid

Data.Name: WIPINGSPEED
Data.Comment: 00 = no wipe ; 01 = low speed ; 10 = high speed ; 11 = Invalid

Data.Name: R_LIGHTS_BY_AUTOLIGHT (ALS)
Data.Comment: 0 = no light requested ; 1 = light on requested

Data.Name: NbKeyStd315MhzLearnt
Data.Comment: Number of 315 MHz keys already learnt

Item.Text: motor fan ON Pos 1, 2, 3 or 4 request for CA/Heating
motor fan OFF (Cf:Renault spec 65430 V2.1 LARC)

Data.Name: C_PTCType
Data.Comment: Config. chauffage additionnel : voir bouton info pour les Watts
Data.Description:
CTP 0 = 0 Watt
  CTP 1= 900 Watts
  CTP 2= 1500 Watts Nissan
  CTP3= 1500 Watts Renault

Data.Name: C_AltRatio
Data.Description:
rapport d'entrainement

- D4F à 3
- K4J à 2,68
- K4M à 2,68
- K9K à 2,68

Data.Name: C_AltType
Data.Description:
Alt-type :
Avec signifie que nous avons un alternateur équipée de la borne DF alors l'autorisation d'enclenchement
des CTPs est conditionné par la charge alternateur.
Sans signifie que nous avons un alternateur non équipée de la borne DF alors l'autorisation
d'enclenchement des CTPs est conditionné par la tension batterie

Item.Text: No LARC request by the customer
No LARC request by the customer

Data.Name: Duree_necessaire_changement_roue
Data.Comment: Time for the spare wheel replacement

Data.Name: Para_Defaut_Roulage
Data.Comment: Threshold to detect a mute sensor when driving

Data.Name: Para_Defaut_Total
Data.Comment: Threshold to detect a mute sensor

Data.Name: Para_Tempo_Emission_Arret
Data.Comment: Time threshold for the sensor transmission during statment

Data.Name: Para_Tempo_Emission_Roulage
Data.Comment: Time threshold for the sensor transmission during driving

Data.Name: Pression_gonflage_preconisee_basse_vitesse_a_l_arriere
Data.Comment: Recommend pressure for the rear axle at low speed

Data.Name: Pression_gonflage_preconisee_basse_vitesse_a_l_avant
Data.Comment: Recommend pressure for the front axle at low speed

Data.Name: Pression_gonflage_préconisee_haute_vitesse_a_l_arriere
Data.Comment: Recommend pressure for the rear axle at high speed

Data.Name: Pression_gonflage_preconisee_haute_vitesse_a_l_avant
Data.Comment: Recommend pressure for the front axle at high speed

Data.Name: Seuil_alarme_vitesse_mini
Data.Comment: Speed Threshold to detect a pressure not adapted to the vehicle speed

Data.Name: Seuil_bas_pression_mauvais_gonflage_du_au_climat
Data.Comment: Pressure Threshold to detect a bad pressure tendency

Data.Name: Seuil_de_faible_sous_gonflage
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a tyre slightly under inflated

Data.Name: Seuil_de_fort_sous_gonflage
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a tyre seriously under inflated

Data.Name: Seuil_desequilibre_gauche_droite
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect an imbalance

Data.Name: Seuil_determination_jeu_pression
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect the pressures not adapted to the vehicle speed

Data.Name: Seuil_dispersion_pneu_singulier
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a single bad pressure

Data.Name: Seuil_ecart_sous_gonflage_faible
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a single under inflated tyre

Data.Name: Seuil_ecart_sur_gonflage_faible
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a single over inflated tyre

Data.Name: Seuil_haut_pression_mauvais_gonflage_du_au_climat
Data.Comment: Pressure Threshold to detect a bad pressure tendency

Data.Name: Seuil_pente_regression1_perte_d_air
Data.Comment: Threshold to detect an abnormal air losses (regression n°1)

Data.Name: Seuil_pente_regression2_perte_d_air
Data.Comment: Threshold to detect an abnormal air losses (regression n°2)

Data.Name: Seuil_pente_regression3_perte_d_air
Data.Comment: Threshold to detect an abnormal air losses (regression n°3)

Data.Name: Seuil_reajustement_pression_negatif_a_chaud
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a negative reajustement with warm tyre

Data.Name: Seuil_reajustement_pression_negatif_a_froid
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a negative reajustement with cold tyre

Data.Name: Seuil_reajustement_pression_positif
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a positive reajustement

Data.Name: Seuil_surgonflage_a_chaud
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a tyre too inflated with warm tyre

Data.Name: Seuil_surgonflage_a_froid
Data.Comment: Pressure threshold to detect a tyre too inflated with cold tyre

Data.Name: Para_Defaut_Batterie
Data.Comment: Threshold to detect a sensor battery default

Data.Name: Seuil_Temperature_Gestion_Pile_Faible
Data.Comment: Temperature threshold to detect a sensor battery default

Data.Name: SpeedPressureMisadaptation_84
Data.Comment: "Pressure not adapted to the vehicle speed" alarm

Data.Name: Precedente_pression_pneu_ARD_valide
Data.Comment: Last correct pressure for the rear right wheel

Data.Name: Precedente_pression_pneu_ARG_valide
Data.Comment: Last correct pressure for the rear left wheel

Data.Name: Precedente_pression_pneu_AVD_valide
Data.Comment: Last correct pressure for the front right wheel

Data.Name: Precedente_pression_pneu_AVG_valide
Data.Comment: Last correct pressure for the front left wheel

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_ARD_froid
Data.Comment: Correct pressure for the cold Rear Right tyre

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_ARD_mesuree_a_froid
Data.Comment: Rear Right measured pressure with cold tyre

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_ARG_froid
Data.Comment: Correct pressure for the cold Rear Left tyre

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_ARG_mesuree_a_froid
Data.Comment: Rear Left measured pressure with cold tyre

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_AVD_froid
Data.Comment: Correct pressure for the cold Front Right tyre

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_AVD_mesuree_a_froid
Data.Comment: Front Right measured pressure with cold tyre

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_AVG_froid
Data.Comment: Correct pressure for the cold Front Left tyre

Data.Name: Pression_pneu_AVG_mesuree_a_froid
Data.Comment: Front Left measured pressure with cold tyre

Data.Name: Vitesse_vehicule
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed for the front axle

Data.Name: Rang_reg1_essieu1
Data.Comment: Number of memorized points for the regression n°1, front axle

Data.Name: Rang_reg1_essieu2
Data.Comment: Number of memorized points for the regression n°1, rear axle

Data.Name: Signe_reg1_essieu1_valeur_1
Data.Comment: Regression 1, front axle : point n° 1 sign

Data.Name: Signe_reg1_essieu2_valeur_1
Data.Comment: Regression 1, rear axle : point n° 1 sign

Data.Name: Rang_reg2_essieu1
Data.Comment: Number of memorized points for the regression n°2, front axle

Data.Name: Rang_reg2_essieu2
Data.Comment: Number of memorized points for the regression n°2, rear axle

Data.Name: Signe_reg2_essieu1_valeur_1
Data.Comment: Regression 2, front axle : point n° 1 sign

Data.Name: Signe_reg2_essieu2_valeur_1
Data.Comment: Regression 2, rear axle : point n° 1 sign

Data.Name: Rang_reg3_essieu1
Data.Comment: Number of memorized points for the regression n°3, front axle

Data.Name: Rang_reg3_essieu2
Data.Comment: Number of memorized points for the regression n°3, rear axle

Data.Name: reg3_essieu1_valeur_3
Data.Comment: Régression 3, essieu avant : valeur du point n° 3

Data.Name: WINDSCREEN_TYPE
Data.Comment: 00 = Low ; 01 = Low Medium ; 10 = Medium High ; 11 = High

Data.Name: TYPE_EVAP
Data.Comment: 0 : no utilisation of information ; 1 : utilisation of evapor information

Data.Name: Superlock Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Superlock actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to unlock SUPERLOCK motors for 0,3 s
BCM to lock SUPERLOCK motors for 0,3 s

Data.Name: Superlock Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Superlock actuator test for Output Control Request

Data.Name: Windows Control Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Windows Control actuator test for Output Contol

Item.Text: BCM to activate WC up motors until block detection
BCM to activate WC down motors until block detection

Data.Name: Windows Control Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Windows Control actuator test for Output Contol

Item.Text: BCM to activate WC up motors
BCM to activate WC down motors

Data.Name: last_brake_padwear_status
Data.Comment: The last brake pad wear status

Data.Name: memory6
Data.Comment: Memorisation of the number of falling ACC relay during the first 6 month of use - data*1 (0 to 510)

Data.Name: memory12
Data.Comment: Memorisation of the number of falling ACC relay during the first 12 month of use - data*1 (0 to 510)

Data.Name: memory18
Data.Comment: Memorisation of the number of falling ACC relay during the first 18 month of use - data*1 (0 to 510)

Data.Name: memory24
Data.Comment: Memorisation of the number of falling ACC relay during the first 24 month of use - data*1 (0 to 510)

Data.Name: memory30
Data.Comment: Memorisation of the number of falling ACC relay during the first 30 month of use - data*1 (0 to 510)

Data.Name: memory36
Data.Comment: Memorisation of the number of falling ACC relay during the first 36 month of use-data*1 (0 to 10000)

Data.Name: Temps_apprent_echoue
Data.Comment: Délai pour décider l'échec de l'autoapprentissage

Data.Name: Temps_apprent_critere2_min
Data.Comment: Délai nécessaire pour effectuer l'autoapprentissage avec le critère 2

Data.Name: Temps_trame_loc_critere_tri
Data.Comment: Délai pour intégrer dans le critère de tri le nombre de trames d'autolocalisation

Data.Name: Signe_reg3_essieu1_valeur_1
Data.Comment: Regression 3, front axle : point n° 1 sign

Data.Name: Signe_reg3_essieu2_valeur_1
Data.Comment: Regression 3, rear axle : point n° 1 sign

Data.Name: Rear Fog Lamp Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Rear Fog Lamp actuator test for Output Contol

Item.Text: BCM to turn on rear fog lamp

Data.Name: Rear Fog Lamp Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Rear Fog Lamp actuator test for Output Contol

Item.Text: BCM to turn on rear fog lamp for 1 s

Data.Name: Rear Wiper Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Rear Wiper actuator test for Output Control

Item.Text: BCM to start RR wiper motor for one cycle

Data.Name: Rear Defrost Indicator.Test
Data.Comment: Rear Defrost Indicator actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to turn on Rear Defogger Indicator

Data.Name: Rear Defrost Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Rear Defrost actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to turn on Rear Defroster during 60s (CAN)

Data.Name: Rear Defrost Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Rear Defrost actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to turn on Rear Defroster

Data.Name: SLEEP_TEMP
Data.Comment: Timeout of the BCM going to sleep after a driver door changing state

Data.Name: SOC_C_tempo_SOC_mini
Data.Comment: This calibration give the minimum delay for the state "on" of the relay - data * 1 min (0 to 30)

Data.Name: SOC_bit_gauge_inhibition
Data.Comment: This boolean is used to inhibit the use of the gauge.

Data.Name: SOC_valid_SOC_level
Data.Comment: Parking time is compared to this calibration - data * 60mn (0 to 720mn)

Data.Name: SOC_gain_VoltageVSTemp
Data.Comment: Correction gain of the battery voltage dealing with the temperature - data * 0.001

Data.Name: SOC_voltage_regulation_level
Data.Comment: This calibration gives the way battery temperature will be evaluated - 12 + data * 0.1

Data.Name: SOC_cst_filter_temp_battery
Data.Comment: Time constant of the battery temperature 1st order filter - data * 10 (10 to 2000)

Data.Name: SOC_acceptable_SOC_level
Data.Comment: SOC level to put off the acc2 relay - data * 1 (0 to 100)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_tempo_maxi_in_1
Data.Comment: Maximum delay for using relay ACC2 - data * 1°C (0 to 50)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_tempo_maxi_in_2
Data.Comment: Maximum delay for using relay ACC2 - data * 1°C (0 to 50)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_tempo_maxi_out_1
Data.Comment: Maximum delay for using relay ACC2 - data * 1mn (1 to 120)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_tempo_maxi_out_2
Data.Comment: Maximum delay for using relay ACC2 - data * 1mn (1 to 120)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_in_1
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*0.05V(10 to13)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_in_2
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*0.05V(10 to13)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_in_3
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*0.05V(10 to13)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_in_4
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*0.05V(10 to13)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_out_1
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*1% (0 to100)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_out_2
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*1% (0 to100)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_out_3
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*1% (0 to100)

Data.Name: SOC_Carto_Voltage_SOC_out_4
Data.Comment: Calibration used to evaluate battery SOC using the no load battery voltage - data*1% (0 to100)

Data.Name: SOC_Relay_acc2
Data.Comment: State of the ACC Shedding 2 relay output

Data.Name: SOC_Relay_on_Delay
Data.Comment: State of the Relay on Delay output

Data.Name: SOC_Delay_max_state
Data.Comment: State of the Delay max state

Data.Name: SOC_Delay_min_state
Data.Comment: State of the Delay min state

Data.Name: SOC_NoLoad_Umemory
Data.Comment: USM battery voltage memorisation - data * 0.05V (10 to13)

Data.Name: SOC_relay_on_SOC
Data.Comment: State of the relay output by the Limphome management

Data.Name: SOC_long_parking_state
Data.Comment: State of the long parking flag

Data.Name: SOC_voltage_correct
Data.Comment: USM battery voltage value corrected following temperature - data * 0,0625 (0 to 15,875)

Data.Name: SOC_battery_SOC
Data.Comment: SOC battery percent level following the Battery Gauge management- data * 1 (0 to 100)

Data.Name: SOC_battery_temperature
Data.Comment: SOC battery temperature value following the evaluation - data * 1 (0 to 50)

Data.Name: SOC_OKToSave
Data.Comment: USM Battery Voltage ready to save (long parking state) status

Data.Name: SOC_initialyse_SOC
Data.Comment: SOC battery percent level of the initialisation - data * 1 (0 to 100)

Data.Name: SOC_last_action_mem
Data.Comment: Memorisation of the "AbsolutTImeSince1rstIgnition" value when "SOC_Relay_diagnosis" falls from 1to 0

Data.Name: Reg1_CDL_SW
Data.Comment: Central Door Lock wake up input switch

Data.Name: Reg1_RR_DOOR
Data.Comment: Rear Right Door wake up input

Data.Name: Reg1_RL_DOOR
Data.Comment: Rear Left Door wake up input

Data.Name: Reg1_TAILGATE_OPENER_SW
Data.Comment: Tailgate Opener Door wake up input switch

Data.Name: Reg1_ALARM_LOGIC_STATUS
Data.Comment: I Logic Alarm wake up input

Data.Name: Reg1_TAIL_LAMP_SW
Data.Comment: Tail Lamp combination-switch wake up input

Data.Name: Reg1_Periodical_WakeUp_Timer
Data.Comment: Global Timer internal wake up condition

Data.Name: Reg1_Internal_Key_Tuner_Link
Data.Comment: Remote Keyless entry wake up condition

Data.Name: Reg3_ECU_AIRBAG
Data.Comment: AIRBAG ECU CAN frames reception information

Data.Name: Reg3_ECU_BRAKE
Data.Comment: BRAKE ECU CAN frames reception information

Data.Name: Reg3_ECU_ECM
Data.Comment: ECM ECU CAN frames reception information

Data.Name: Reg3_ECU_CLIM
Data.Comment: CLIM ECU CAN frames reception information

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_arret_ARD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last statments for the rear right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_arret_ARG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last statments for the rear left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_arret_AVD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last statments for the front right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_arret_AVG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last statments for the front left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_arret_ARD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the statments for the rear right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_arret_ARG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the statments for the rear left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_arret_AVD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the statments for the front right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_arret_AVG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the statments for the front left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_roulage_ARD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the drives for the rear right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_roulage_ARG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the drives for the rear left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_roulage_AVD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the drives for the front right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_perm_roulage_AVG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the drives for the front left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_roulage_ARD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last drives for the rear right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_roulage_ARG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last drives for the rear left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_roulage_AVD
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last drives for the front right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_trame_roulage_AVG
Data.Comment: Number of frames no seen during the last drives for the front left sensor

Data.Name: Defaut_trame_ARD
Data.Comment: No reception of the Rear Right sensor

Data.Name: Defaut_trame_ARG
Data.Comment: No reception of the Rear Left sensor

Data.Name: Defaut_trame_AVD
Data.Comment: No reception of the Front Right sensor

Data.Name: Defaut_trame_AVG
Data.Comment: No reception of the Front Left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_batterie_AVG
Data.Comment: Number of frames with a battery default for the front left sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_batterie_AVD
Data.Comment: Number of frames with a battery default for the front right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_batterie_ARD
Data.Comment: Number of frames with a battery default for the rear right sensor

Data.Name: Cpt_defaut_batterie_ARG
Data.Comment: Number of frames with a battery default for the rear left sensor

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(i)
Data.Comment: Identity code for the active set

Data.Name: Door Lock Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Door Lock actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to lock all doors CDL motors for 0,3 s
BCM to unlock all doors CDL motors for 0,3 s
BCM to unlock passager doors CDL motors for 0,3 s
BCM to unlock driver door CDL motors for 0,3 s
BCM to unlock PLC doors CDL motors for 0,3 s
BCM to unlock Tailgate doors CDL motors for 0,5 s
BCM to unlock Fuel doors CDL motors for 0,3 s

Data.Name: Door Lock Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Door Lock actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to lock all doors CDL motors
BCM to unlock all doors CDL motors
BCM to unlock passager doors CDL motors
BCM to unlock driver door CDL motors
BCM to unlock PLC doors CDL motors
BCM to unlock Tailgate doors CDL motors
BCM to unlock Fuel doors CDL motors

Data.Name: Child Lock Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Child Lock actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to unlock CHILDLOCK motors for 0,3 s
BCM to lock CHILDLOCK motors for 0,3 s

Data.Name: Child Lock Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Child Lock actuator test for Output Control Request

Data.Name: Back Door Open Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Back Door Open actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to unlock Fuel doors CDL motors for 0,3 s

Data.Name: Back Door Open Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Back Door Open actuator test for Output Control Request

Item.Text: BCM to unlock Fuel doors CDL motors
BCM to send CAN message (Buzzer Request 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (Buzzer Request 00001)
BCM to send CAN message (LowBeamRequest : 0, HighBeamRequest : 0)
BCM to send CAN message (LowBeamRequest : 1, HighBeamRequest : 0)
BCM to send CAN message (LowBeamRequest : 0, HightBeamRequest : 1)

Data.Name: HVAC Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: BCM to send CAN message (ClimateCoolingRequest : 1) during 5s

Item.Text: BCM to send CAN message (ClimateCoolingRequest : 1) during 5s
BCM to activate ACC shedding 1 for 1 s
BCM to activate ACC shedding 2 for 1 s

Data.Name: Flasher Permanent.Test
Data.Comment: Flasher actuator test for Output Control

Item.Text: BCM to stop flashing DI Lamps and send CAN message (Flashing Indicator Status : 000)
BCM to flash RH DI Lamp and send CAN message (Flashing Indicator Status : 010)
BCM to flash LH DI Lamp and send CAN message (Flashing Indicator Status : 001)

Data.Name: Flasher Temporary.Test
Data.Comment: Flasher actuator test for Output Control

Item.Text: BCM to flash RH DI Lamp 5 times (like super-lock condamnation) and send CAN message (Flashing Indicator Status : 010)
BCM to flash LH DI Lamp 5 times (like super-lock condamnation) and send CAN message (Flashing Indicator Status : 001
BCM to flash RH DI and LH DI Lamp 5 times (like super-lock condamnation) and send CAN message (Flashing Indicator Status : 010 and 001)
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Inhibition_jeu_hiver_ete
Data.Comment: Inhibition de la prestation jeu hiver / jeu été

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(1)_(0)
Data.Comment: Ident roue avant gauche ( roue 1, jeu 0)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(2)_(0)
Data.Comment: Ident roue avant droite ( roue 2, jeu 0)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(3)_(0)
Data.Comment: Ident roue arrière droite ( roue 3, jeu 0)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(4)_(0)
Data.Comment: Ident roue arrière gauche ( roue 4, jeu 0)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(1)_(1)
Data.Comment: Ident roue avant gauche ( roue 1, jeu 1)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(2)_(1)
Data.Comment: Ident roue avant droite ( roue 2, jeu 1)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(3)_(1)
Data.Comment: Ident roue arrière droite ( roue 3, jeu 1)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(4)_(1)
Data.Comment: Ident roue arrière gauche ( roue 4, jeu 1)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(1)_active
Data.Comment: Ident roue avant gauche ( roue 1, jeu actif)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(2)_active
Data.Comment: Ident roue avant droite ( roue 2, jeu actif)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(3)_active
Data.Comment: Ident roue arrière droite ( roue 3, jeu actif)

Data.Name: CodeIdentite(4)_active
Data.Comment: Ident roue arrière gauche ( roue 4, jeu actif)

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_data(1)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas reçus avec le code du capteur AVG présent avant l'arrêt de 15 minutes

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_loc(1)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de localisation reçus avec le code du capteur AVG présent avant l'arrêt de 15 mn

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_data(2)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas reçus avec le code du capteur AVD présent avant l'arrêt de 15 minutes

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_loc(2)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de localisation reçus avec le code du capteur AVD présent avant l'arrêt de 15 mn

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_data(3)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas reçus avec le code du capteur ARD présent avant l'arrêt de 15 minutes

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_loc(3)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de localisation reçus avec le code du capteur ARD présent avant l'arrêt de 15 mn

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_data(4)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas reçus avec le code du capteur ARG présent avant l'arrêt de 15 minutes

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_ident_anciens_loc(4)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de localisation reçus avec le code du capteur ARG présent avant l'arrêt de 15 mn

Data.Name: Ident_new(1)
Data.Comment: Code d'un (sur 4 possible)des nouveaux identifiants déteminé par l'autoapprentissage

Data.Name: Ident_new(2)
Data.Comment: Code d'un (sur 4 possible)des nouveaux identifiants déteminé par l'autoapprentissage

Data.Name: Ident_new(3)
Data.Comment: Code d'un (sur 4 possible)des nouveaux identifiants déteminé par l'autoapprentissage

Data.Name: Ident_new(4)
Data.Comment: Code d'un (sur 4 possible)des nouveaux identifiants déteminé par l'autoapprentissage

Data.Name: Nbre_trame_ident_new(1)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas contenant Ident_new(1)

Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas contenant Ident_new(3)

Data.Name: Nbre_trame_ident_new(4)
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas contenant Ident_new(4)

Data.Name: Nbre_capteur_change
Data.Comment: Nombre de capteurs changés trouvés par la fonction autoapprentissage

Data.Name: Capteurs_absents_alrn
Data.Comment: Nombre de capteurs absents trouvés par la fonction autoapprentissage

Data.Name: PLAF_Strategie
Data.Comment: Choice of the strategy (G2001 or G2005) - 0 : G2001 / 1 : G2005

Data.Name: Delai_critere_tri
Data.Comment: Délai entre chaque tri des identifiants

Data.Name: Mini_temps_apprent
Data.Comment: Délai entre le déut de l'autoapprentissage et le début du tri des capteurs

Data.Name: Nbre_trame presence
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames d'autolocalisation nécessaires pour confirmer la présence d'un précédent capteur

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_alrn_1
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas minimum pour décréter la fin de l'autoapprentissage avec le critère 1

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_alrn_2
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas minimum pour effectuer l'autoapprentissage avec le critère 1

Data.Name: Nbre_trames_alrn_3
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames de datas minimum pour décréter la fin de l'autoapprentissage avec le critère 2

Data.Name: Nbre_trame_loc_critere_tri
Data.Comment: Nombre de trames d'autolocalisation nécessaire pour le critère critere_tri

Data.Name: Delai_standby_alrn
Data.Comment: Délai pour le standby de l'autoapprentissage

Request.Comment: Read the after sales code

Request.Comment: Trame C1 pour diagnostic fonctionnel

Request.Comment: Status of the test of key authentication

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData

Request.Name: DataRead.bootSoftwareIdentification
Request.Comment: Service 22 request begin by DataRead.

Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Status_Read_data_extended_memory

Request.Name: Creneaux_TUP
Request.Comment: Number of pulses by detection request

Request.Name: Km_nominale_TUP
Request.Comment: Distance in kilometers between two transmissions of detection request in nominal mode

Request.Name: Km_défaut_TUP
Request.Comment: Distance in kilometers between two transmissions of detection request in fault mode

Request.Name: Seuil_defaut_TUP
Request.Comment: Number of defects saved before the request for switching on of the warning light

Request.Name: Creneaux_valid_TUP
Request.Comment: Number of pulses received by detection request for validation of the frame
